title: equisetum arvense f. nanum
intro: Equisetum arvense f. nanum, also known as dwarf horsetail, is a small, perennial plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is a subspecies of Equisetum arvense. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of dwarf horsetail include its ability to support kidney function, lower blood pressure, and reduce symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Dwarf horsetail can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
